app_release_notes: v1.0.3 - Big Measure-a-Ladder update: mark several groups on one target photo (each labeled by charge), Set scale is now a simple ruler (drag, then Set length), and seating ladders support a jam, not just a jump. Loads are simpler too - one active load at a time, older ones under Past Loads, and new loads name themselves from your rifle and cartridge.
